summary: Phase 3 Audit Iteration 8 - All tests passed. Fixed critical bug in push_undo() function missing side_effects parameter. Backend 13/13 tests passed. Frontend UI verified all Phase 3 Audit requirements: semantic cell display (actual/planned/variance), single scroll container, carry-forward with target month, write-off with explicit message, undo hint, and backend-driven totals.

fixed.issue: 500 Internal Server Error - push_undo() missing side_effects parameter
fixed.fix: Added side_effects parameter to push_undo() function signature

seed_data_creation: Test flows created and cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Audit complete. All features verified: 1) Matrix cells with actuals show semantic display: actual value (cyan), planned (strikethrough), variance delta (amber/emerald). 2) Single scroll container for matrix header/body/totals. 3) ActualInputDialog carry-forward button shows target month name and 'Creates a one-time recovery flow' description. 4) ActualInputDialog write-off button shows 'permanently ignored — no carryover created' message. 5) Undo hint text present in dialog. 6) Backend returns revenue_per_month, cost_per_month, cash_balance_per_month, net_per_month in matrix endpoint. 7) 24M horizon returns 24 months of totals. 8) Undo chain restores occurrence AND carryover flows. 9) Carryover flows appear in matrix with '(variance carryover)' label. Fixed bug: push_undo() was missing side_effects parameter causing 500 errors on flow-occurrences endpoints.
passed_tests: Backend: Matrix returns revenue_per_month
Backend: Matrix returns cost_per_month
Backend: Matrix returns cash_balance_per_month
Backend: Matrix returns net_per_month
Backend: 24M horizon returns 24 months
Backend: Cell without actual has has_actual=false
Backend: Cell with actual shows actual, planned, variance
Backend: Carry-forward creates carryover flow in next month
Backend: Carry-forward response includes target_month
Backend: Write-off does NOT create carryover
Backend: Undo removes occurrence AND carryover flow
Backend: Distributed revenue with linked COGS shows correct per-period amounts
Backend: Undo peek returns has_undo field
Frontend: Matrix scroll container (single container)
Frontend: Total Revenue row present
Frontend: Total Cost row present
Frontend: Net P/L row present
Frontend: Cash Balance row present
Frontend: ActualInputDialog opens on cell click
Frontend: Planned amount displayed in dialog
Frontend: Variance summary displayed when actual differs
Frontend: Carry forward button shows target month name
Frontend: Carry forward button mentions one-time recovery flow
Frontend: Write off button shows 'permanently ignored, no carryover' message
Frontend: Undo hint text present in dialog
Frontend: Cell semantic display - actual value (cyan)
Frontend: Cell semantic display - planned (strikethrough)
Frontend: Cell semantic display - variance delta
Frontend: 24M horizon shows Total 24M column
Frontend: Carryover flow appears in matrix after carry-forward

matrix_cell_semantic_display.details: Cells with actuals show: actual value (cyan), planned (strikethrough), variance delta (amber for under, emerald for over)

single_scroll_container.details: Matrix header, body rows, total rows, and cash balance all scroll in sync within single container

carry_forward_dialog.details: Shows target month name (e.g., 'Carry forward to May 2026') and description 'Creates a one-time recovery flow'

write_off_dialog.details: Shows explicit message 'CHF X variance is permanently ignored — no carryover created'

undo_hint.details: Dialog shows 'All actions are undoable via the undo button in the header'

backend_driven_totals.details: Matrix endpoint returns revenue_per_month, cost_per_month, cash_balance_per_month, net_per_month - frontend reads these directly

24m_horizon.details: 24M horizon returns 24 months of data with Total 24M column

undo_chain.details: Undo restores both occurrence record AND removes carryover flows created by carry-forward

bug_fixed.description: push_undo() function was missing side_effects parameter
bug_fixed.root_cause: The UndoAction model had side_effects field but push_undo() function didn't accept it as parameter
bug_fixed.fix_applied: Added side_effects=None parameter to push_undo() function and passed it to UndoAction constructor
